messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Worker prompt hierarchy is strict: Gov adversarial baton, structured canonical state, then artifact context.
Raw accumulating transcript injection is forbidden; use structured state and artifact refs only.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

routing_lens.unresolved_dependency: General warning versus exact export execution license: {"resolution": "WARN-SIE-073 correctly cited as supporting context confirming exact-match requirement. LIC-SIE-073 fails because destination scope does not cover SHIP-SIE-073 destination.", "status": "RESOLVED"}

worker_verdict_analysis.reasoning: Destination mismatch (Chile vs Peru) between SHIP-SIE-073 and LIC-SIE-073 is a genuine source-boundary defect. STD-SIE-073-P mandates exact match on all five fields before execution. This defect cannot be resolved through artifact repair—it requires either new evidence or denial.

gate_status.interpretation: Worker output is structurally sound. All 4 source IDs are legitimate. No repair needed on worker artifact.

binding_analysis.controlling_constraint: STD-SIE-073-P exact-match rule on ECCN, destination, end user, shipment date, license effective date
binding_analysis.defect_type: Source-record mismatch between shipment and license (destination field)
binding_analysis.repairability: NOT_REPAIRABLE - defect exists in source records themselves; no artifact manipulation can change Chile to Peru without new evidence

no_substitutions_flag.implication: Model substitution blocked. Cross-DNA repair not permitted. Must work with current grok-3-mini output if escalated to continue.

full_latest_gov_baton.gov_command: Diagnose previous worker output, preserve correct source bindings, repair gate failures, block invalid moves, and create the next worker baton.

gov_action.reasoning_for_final_compiler: Gate passed and verdict is source-correct. The destination mismatch is a fundamental source-record defect—not a word-band, proof, or section failure. No artifact repair can close this boundary. No additional evidence exists in source_context to reconcile Chile/Peru. Policy requires exact match before execution; exact match impossible with current sources. Proceed to final compiler with ESCALATE.

full_latest_gov_baton.source_gate_interpretation: Worker correctly identified destination mismatch (SHIP Chile vs LIC Peru) as blocking defect per STD-SIE-073-P exact-match requirement. Gate passed confirms artifact integrity. Verdict ESCALATE is binding source conclusion, not repairable artifact issue.
blocked_moves: Artifact word-band repairs (mismatch is in source records, not worker output)
Allow rule execution (destination defect cannot be waived)
Planning artifact as execution authority (LIC-SIE-073 is execution authority but covers wrong destination)
dependency_ledger: General warning versus exact export execution license: {"resolution": "WARN-SIE-073 correctly cited as supporting context confirming exact-match requirement. LIC-SIE-073 fails because destination scope does not cover SHIP-SIE-073 destination.", "status": "RESOLVED"}

Source-record defect: {"resolution": "No repair path exists within source_context. Either new license covering Chile, or shipment rerouted to Peru, required to close boundary.", "status": "UNRESOLVED_AND_UNREPAIRABLE"}

next_worker_baton.monotonic_preservation: Preserve all cited source IDs and their exact content through final compiler
next_worker_baton.special_instructions: No further worker turns required. Boundary is definitively open. Pass to final compiler for ESCALATE confirmation and denial documentation.

final_compiler_instruction.open_blocker: Destination mismatch - SHIP-SIE-073 authorizes Chile, LIC-SIE-073 authorizes Peru
final_compiler_instruction.denial_rationale: STD-SIE-073-P requires exact match on all five fields before controlled export release. Exact match impossible with current source records. No execution authority exists.
final_compiler_instruction.document_action: DENY release - logistics may not release controlled export shipment under current source evidence

gov_adversarial_baton.role_frame: Act as an adversarial source-boundary verifier, not a sycophant.

structured_canonical_state.USER_GOAL: Decide whether the action may proceed using only source records in this packet.
SETTLED_DECISIONS: Gov chooses control actions, not models.

state_brief.pinned_best_artifact_full_text:
{
  "boundary_binding": {
    "action_boundary": "May logistics release the controlled export shipment?",
    "allow_rule_assessment": "No exact match on destination between shipment record and license record.",
    "binding_class": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN",
    "controlling_source_fact": "STD-SIE-073-P requires exact match on ECCN, destination, end user, shipment date before export.",
    "escalate_rule_assessment": "Destination mismatch (Chile vs Peru) leaves narrow source-record defect open.",
    "timing_scope_authority_dependency_check": "License effective date matches but destination and end-user scope fail exact boundary closure."
  },
  "cited_evidence": [
    "SHIP-SIE-073",
    "LIC-SIE-073",
    "STD-SIE-073-P"
  ],
  "critical_features_preserved": [
    "source IDs",
    "action boundary",
    "policy exact-match rule"
  ],
  "final_answer": "ESCALATE required. SHIP-SIE-073 specifies Chile destination while LIC-SIE-073 authorizes only Peru. WARN-SIE-073 and STD-SIE-073-P mandate exact license match on destination before release. Boundary remains open; no execution authority exists from current sources.",
  "open_blockers": [
    "Destination mismatch between SHIP-SIE-073 and LIC-SIE-073"
  ],
  "verification_verdict": "ESCALATE",
  "worker_role": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_MAPPER"
}

task_and_answer_contract.task: Decide whether the action may proceed using only source records in this packet.
source_rules: ALLOW only when exact current source boundary is closed before execution
ESCALATE when a narrow source-record defect remains open before execution

structured_canonical_state.current_turn_command: Act under the baton. If state and Gov conflict, flag the conflict in open_blockers.

action.description: May logistics release the controlled export shipment?

context.action_boundary: May logistics release the controlled export shipment?
context.anomaly_observed: A broad dual-use warning remains visible, while export license evidence may exactly match the current shipment.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Shipment SHIP-SIE-073 exports ECCN 3A991 sensor array to Chile for end user Andes Labs on 2026-06-28.
Dual-use warning WARN-SIE-073 says similar sensor arrays require exact license evidence and should not rely on product family alone.
Export license LIC-SIE-073 covers ECCN 3A991 sensor array, destination Peru, end user Andes Labs, shipment date 2026-06-28, effective before export.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Controlled export is complete only when export license evidence matches ECCN, destination, end user, shipment date, and license effective date before export.
